rss_pool.title: Bitcoin’s quantum problem gets a recovery tool, but not for Satoshi’s 1.1 million coins
rss_pool.summary_raw: Project Eleven says it has funded a proof that lets a wallet's own key-derivation path stand in as ownership after quantum computers can forge its signatures. It runs in 243 milliseconds on a laptop.

rss_pool.title: Electronic Transactions Association CEO Expecting More Partnerships with Bitcoin Startups
rss_pool.summary_raw: Electronic Transactions Association (ETA) CEO, Jason Oxman, indicated that members of his organization might start recognizing Bitcoin’s disruptive potential, suggesting that this might lead to more partnerships between traditional electronic payment providers and Bitcoin startups.

rss_pool.title: Inside Zcash's new node that targets Visa-scale privacy at 50,000 transactions per second
rss_pool.summary_raw: The new Zakura client is the first live piece of a plan to take Zcash from roughly one private transaction per second to payment-network scale.

rss_pool.title: US regulators miss GENIUS Act’s one-year deadline for final stablecoin rules
rss_pool.summary_raw: The delay does not postpone the law’s Jan. 18, 2027 effective date, leaving regulators and stablecoin issuers with a compressed implementation window.

rss_pool.title: France orders country's internet service providers to block Polymarket
rss_pool.summary_raw: The regulator cited concerns over addictive mechanics, a lack of self-exclusion tools, and a high volume of French users bypassing previous financial restrictions.

rss_pool.summary_raw: A prior December raise instead funded stakes tied to SpaceX and Figure AI, which the company says are its two AI infrastructure investments to date.

rss_pool.summary_raw: Leonidas' DOG Mode client challenges Bitcoin's default relay policies, reopening a philosophical debate over censorship, free markets and who really governs the network.

rss_pool.summary_raw: Large traders are betting on a BTC price rise to $72,000 by the end of the month, latest options market flow suggests.

rss_pool.summary_raw: CryptoQuant said Michael Saylor's Strategy still needs still needs clearer rules for when to buy and sell bitcoin.
